summary: Soundboard recording praised as a great tape but hampered by mis‑ordered post‑break tracks
review: The reviewer calls the tape great, indicating solid sound quality typical of a soundboard source, yet points out that the tracks after the set break are mislabeled, which detracts from the listening experience. No musical performance details were given.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑star review; positive remarks about tape quality balanced by a complaint about track ordering, leading to an overall middling rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall great tape quality noted, but post‑set break tracks are misaligned/mislabeled, causing confusion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on performance; only issue mentioned is track ordering after the set break.
